expected_discriminator.inconclusive: V2276 cannot map the mismatch sites or the private codeword log is insufficient to distinguish runtime patching from bad slide selection.
expected_discriminator.negative: V2276 shows the three PC mismatches are not explainable by known runtime-patch/codeword exception patterns, so V2275 workqueue function pointers remain untrusted and a narrower same-boot oracle is required.
expected_discriminator.positive: V2276 explains all three V2275 PC mismatches as known runtime-patch/codeword exception sites while LR/LR-4 remain exact, allowing a patch-aware same-boot slide acceptance for workqueue function-pointer classification.

live_result.rollback: manual V2237 rollback completed; version/status/selftest fail=0 confirmed

Compare each mismatch static address/instruction against stock raw, known runtime-patch/JOPP/alternatives patterns, and the exact LR/LR-4 evidence.

If not justified, mark the V2275 workqueue classification inconclusive and design a narrower same-boot symbolization oracle rather than rerunning generic CPU-clock sampling.
Keep this host-only; no Wi-Fi scan/connect/DHCP/ping, credentials, or device flash.
